workflow_name: Executive Meeting Transcript -> Manager Brief + Asks
user_message: I need you to process this exec meeting notes from Contoso Ltd. We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: QBR preparation Discussion - Contoso Ltd
Date: 2024-01-26
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on QBR preparation from our last session.

[00:05:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:08:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:10:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

[00:18:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around stakeholder alignment.

[00:21:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:23:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:26:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:28:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:30:00] Angela Doyle (Contoso Ltd): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

handoffs.condition: business review narrative input from exec meeting

usability_anchors: Score 5: Perfect execution of the golden-path workflow with all artifacts complete and actionable
Score 3: Core output correct but missing polish or one secondary artifact
Score 1: Fails to produce expected output for a clean, unambiguous request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: All evidence correctly sourced and attributed; no hallucination
Score 3: Minor attribution gap but no fabrication
Score 1: Evidence fabricated or significantly misattributed
decision_anchors: Score 5: All decisions correct for this straightforward scenario
Score 3: Primary decision correct; minor secondary issue
Score 1: Primary decision wrong despite clear inputs

guardrail_checks: Clean golden-path scenario -- all guardrails should pass trivially
Must not over-complicate a straightforward request
